CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.etGatewayId: The ID of the dedicated gateway
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.healthCheckSourceIp: If this parameter is not specified, the system will automatically assign an IP address
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval, an integer between 1 and 60, in seconds
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.healthThreshold: Healthy threshold, an integer between 2 and 5
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.unhealthThreshold: Unhealthy threshold, an integer between 2 and 5
CreateDedicatedGatewayHealthCheck.autoGenerateRouteRule: Whether to automatically generate probe routing rules; enabled by default. Set to false to disable.
